faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Datta Meghe College of Physiotherapy, Nagpur Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

review_content.Placements: There are 50 seats for each batch. It may increase every year. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. It depends on students' skills. Students can work in any top hospital and treat patients. They can open clinics. The patient flow increases based on students' skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many classrooms. We have separate classrooms for every subject. We have to go to the classroom respectively. Our college has labs. The library consists of many books. It has reference books for the subject. The hostel is good and very disciplined.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The college offers 6 months of internship for every student in every department. Number of patients visit OPD which gives students a good experience. The college provides internship to students but without stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college and OPD is good. The OPD has all the machines and equipment required for practice. The hostel is also well furnished but the authority is quite strict. It is difficult to remove admission from girls hostel once registered and hostel mess is not good.
review_content.Faculty: The professors are all MPT degree holders. Interaction with staff is really good. The staff is friendly and helpful. In a month, student teacher interaction is conducted twice to help students. The course makes the student ready for clinical practice as it provides clinical posting to students from second year itself. The internal exam pattern is same as the university pattern and helps to prepare students for university exams. The difficulty level and marking also matches the same.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers the best faculty and academics.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers skills assessment, physiotherapy practicals, group discussions, and panel interviews for students. Every detail is covered by our college, and after graduation, students can focus on post-graduation. An entrance exam for post-graduation has been given to get admitted to government colleges in Maharashtra. Many opt for foreign education too.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have the best-quality hostel in our college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Our college has provided medical facilities. Sports and games like cricket and football are played every year. An annual fest is organised called Amroha, consisting of sports events, cultural events, Bollywood Day, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty members, supportive kind seniors, great curriculum, and good practical knowledge.

content.Placements: The recent 4th year batch of our college has a 100% result with ranking 5 in the Nagpur district. The interns are being placed for the internship in the parent's hospital owned by Data Meghe which has plenty of patient flow, helpful to achieve sufficient experience during the internship period. No stipend is provided during the internships.
content.Infrastructure: College has a good and peaceful environment. There are separate well maintained classrooms with projectors. The library is good with very supportive librarians. Library is equipped with all the necessary books and also with some extra reference books, free Wi-Fi, and having separate student section helping students with their queries. Hostel is good with good maintenance and with supportive staff and all the facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money as teachers are super friendly.

content.Placements: College does not provide any placement as any other medical college. They don't have any placement agencies with them, which can help us to get placements, but one can build connections during college with patients and turn them into their placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is still developing. Major classes are not well-maintained but all the classes are under development and smart classes too. Hopefully, they are also installing ACs in every classroom. Each classroom has projectors and building is quite old and campus is very short. The campus is in combination with different colleges, including YCC Data, Medical College, Data Meghe Ayurvedic College, Data Meghe Pharmacy College, and SOS School, so campus is pretty huge. One requires a bike to travel to the college, campus is quite short. College does not have a campus.

faqs.question: How can I get into Bhagwan Mahavir College of Pharmacy, Bhagwan Mahavir University for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Bhagwan Mahavir College of Pharmacy, Bhagwan Mahavir University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics / Biotechnology / Biology with at least mentioned marks (40% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together from a recognised board.D.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/ Biology (Botany and Zoology) from a recognised board.M.PharmaAll Non-GPAT candidates including sponsored (Non-GPAT) shall have to appear in PGCET-2023 to become eligible for admission.

The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The university had good placements. About 90% of students got job opportunities. The salary packages offered were average. There is the BHMS MD course. The position of a medical officer, RMO, or assistant position can be provided after passing BHMS. Every hospital needs RMO for IPD. There are many positions in BHMS.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure was available on campus. The hostel and its facilities were good. Course infrastructure was good. Hostel infrastructure was also good and well-mannered. Wi-Fi, lab, and library were available. Proper hygienic surroundings and good quality food were provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers good learning and experiences.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good because every year very reputed companies visit the campus for recruitment and students have to work hard for that. Around 60% of the students get placed from college. Companies like TCI, ICICI Prudential, Airtel, and Mahindra Finance visit the campus for recruitment. Almost 75% of the students got internships with a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month - Rs. 10,000 per month. Best roles are offered in our course. Various seminars are also organised in which top businessman visits our college so that students can learn from their experiences.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placement. It is not an engineering or MBA course that you can get placements from several companies. It is a medical course so they give you a degree and then you have to fight with several exams or pass the interviews in the hospitals to get a job. Some students got placed in foreign countries. Around 10% of the students got internships from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but not working. They don't even correct it. Labs are good but the quantity of infrastructure is less. Classrooms are good enough but they can be better. The library is small and they don't have enough books for all the students. The books always run out of stock.

individual_reviews.title: Best faculty and good ambiance.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college and campus is quite good. it also have a nice ambiance and Wi-Fi all over the campus and nice books of collection in library. the computer is also working good at an excellent condition. Over all it has good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2016 and really good infrastructure.

Average salary offered by companies is Rs.30-40K and company offered managerial role in various departments of the company. 90%of the students got internship from college. Highest stipend offered range is Rs. 5-10k per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, environment friendly with power backup facilities. Smart classroom, Wi-Fi campus, e-library and sports department facilities are provided. Classroom quality is good. Computer lab is hi-tech with internet connection.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG level, the institute has courses such as BTech, BSc, BCom, BPharm, etc. while at the PG level Sankalchand Patel University Visnagar Gujarat extends courses such as MTech, MSc, MPharm, MDS, MDes, etc. The university also offers PhD programme.

faqs.answer: A:    Depending on the particular degree you're interested in, Sankalchand Patel University (SPU) accepts scores from a variety of entrance tests for admission to its undergraduate and graduate programmes. GUJCET, SPU-CET, JEE Main, and so on. SPU may also take into account test results from other programmes, such as the NEET for pharmacy (B.Pharma), CAT for MBA (MBA), CLAT for law (LL.B.), etc. Exam results from the GATE, CAT, GMAT, GRE, or university-specific entrance tests are required for the majority of postgraduate programmes, including M.Tech, M.Pharma, M.Sc., MBA, and so on.For some programmes, such as M.Tech and M.Sc., SPU administers its own postgraduate entrance test (SPU-PET). SPU provides minimal eligibility requirements for each programme, such as a needed percentage in Class 12th or qualifying scores in prior admission tests, in addition to entrance exam results. The number of candidates, exam difficulty, and available seats are some of the elements that affect the cut-off scores for each programme and entrance exam.For up-to-date deadline information, visit the university website or get in touch with the admissions department.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sankalchand Patel University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into SPU for a MTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass BE/BTech or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% for the General Category and 45% aggregate for SC/ST/SEBC. Sankalchand Patel University offers full-time M.Tech courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid GATE exam score/ACPC Admission. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility).
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Tech at Sankalchand Patel University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates cannot join Sankalchand Patel University without an entrance exam.  The university offers courses, such as MBBS, BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, NEET, NEET MDS, etc. for admission to specific courses. Sankalchand Patel University offers 20 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Business & Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at Sankalchand Patel University without appearing in any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    To secure admission to the Sankalchand Patel University BBA programme, candidates need to have passed their Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board. Candidates should ensure that they fulfill the required eligibility criteria prior to applying. Candidates are also required to provide supporting documents to establish their eligibility. In order to confirm their seat, they need to pay the relevant course fee.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Sankalchand Patel University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enroll for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (PCM), 40% for SC, ST, SEBC. SPU admission process is entrance-based.

overview_faqs.question: Is M.Tech expensive at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

review_summary.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from AI & this get placed every year. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the average package offered is 4 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini. Internships are offered in firms like TCS iON and AI/ML startups. Roles include Data Analyst, AI Engineer, Software Developer, and ML Engineer. Placement training and mock interviews help improve results.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent start, but it needs improvement.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are limited especially for core branches. Only a few companies visit the campus and the packages offered are mostly low. Students are good and almost all receive placement training but it's not very impactful in terms of real results.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and powerful, and they provide good learning experiences. Some professors are helpful and experienced, while others are less engaging or hard to approach. Teaching methods are mostly theory-based with a limited focus on overall practical knowledge.

paragraphs: Sankalchand Patel University admissionsare mainly entrance-based. The admission process at the university requires students to register at the website of the university. Interested students can follow the steps below to completeSankalchand Patel University admission process:
SPU Application Process

The mode of application is online/offline. Students must apply for JEE Main for BTech, CMAT for MBA etc., for admission to the various courses. They can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as GATE, NEET, etc for admission to the MTech, MBBS among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation

After the release ofSankalchand Patel University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay the Sankalchand Patel University fee to confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Tech at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: To get into SPU for a MTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass BE/BTech or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% for the General Category and 45% aggregate for SC/ST/SEBC. Sankalchand Patel University offers full-time M.Tech courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid GATE exam score/ACPC Admission. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility).

Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: Sankalchand Patel University admissions are currently open expect for PhD courses. Candidates are selected for courses based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university. The applications are open for various courses at the UG and PG level. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

faqs.question: Do I need 50% in Class 12 to get admission at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can apply for various courses at Sankalchand Patel University with a 50% in Class 12. The university offers courses, such as MBBS, BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Candidates can check the list of course eligibility from the table presented below:Course NameEligibilityBTechClass 12 with a 45% aggregate (PCM)40% for SC, ST, SEBCMBAGraduation with a 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)MTechBE/BTech or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% for the General Category and 45% aggregate for SC/ST/SEBCMDSBDSBDSClass 12 with a 50% aggregate (PCB) 45% for Gen-PH Category & 40% aggregate for Reserved (SC, ST, SEBC including Physically disabled)

faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at Sankalchand Patel University without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot join Sankalchand Patel University without an entrance exam.  The university offers courses, such as MBBS, BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, NEET, NEET MDS, etc. for admission to specific courses. Sankalchand Patel University offers 20 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams likeArts, Business & Management,Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: Sankalchand Patel University admissions are entrance-based. The university considers national-level entrance exam scores for various course admission. The entrance exams accepted are JEE Main, CMAT, GATE, etc. Besides, the university also conducts a written test for PhD courses. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

placement_data.title: Sankalchand Patel University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not disclosed 2025 placement statistics. As per the NIRF report 2025 released by the University, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2024 stood at INR 3.80 LPA and INR 7.40 LPA , respectively. The median package recorded during Sankalchand Patel University placements 2024 was INR 8.42 LPA . Further, the median package offered during Sankalchand Patel University PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2024 stood at INR 10.98 LPA and INR 9.89 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech expensive at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
faqs.answer: Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma. There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

qs_world.description:
Sankalchand Patel University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Sankalchand Patel University fell 400 ranks to #1301 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Sankalchand Patel University fell 137 ranks to #429 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.
reviews.review_text: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A decent start, but it needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 23 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering, Gujrat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my department and college are very good and our college work very hard on it for good attention from students for new admission. We have free Wi-Fi, and good and clean labs with all machines. We also have library and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a computer in every lab. They provide us with internet too. We have a good canteen which provides us unlimited full dishes for Rs. 70. In the canteen, vada pav, dosa, bhel, bhaji pav, cold drinks, water bottles, etc., are present. Our canteen has a good design for winter and summer like providing AC and fans in summer.

reviews.review_heading: Good university, good placements, and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very clean and big. Library is the also very clean and pin drop silent in the library, and the pharmacy lab is also very clean, big lab, and secure lab. Food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 1 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall the college has good infrastructure and average placemen
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities like new labs , auditorium . The hostel infrastructure is not enough good but they are renovating. Our college campus is way more better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in North Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: A library is available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Many students borrow books from the library. The quality of food in the canteen and hostels is good. A playground is available. Students play games during sports week. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. S.B. Patel Institute of Business ManagementReviewed on 12 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: A very genuine university that teaches very well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and attractive. It has very big and separate classrooms for every batch. They provide electricity and washroom service any time. The college has a very big library from where every student can get their reading material without any cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 7 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All labs, classrooms, and the library are good and spacious. They have a good atmosphere for studying. The hostel rooms provide good facilities. The food served in the mess is good. There is a huge hospital on our campus. There are many grounds for different games to play.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. S.B. Patel Institute of Business ManagementReviewed on 15 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our institute is one of the best for business management.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has a little old infrastructure with many classrooms, some fully computerised laboratories, and a library for students to go through their study materials. It has many books. Hostels are safe and have good infrastructure in the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 2 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Average placement, average faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our university, Wi-Fi is free for students in the entire campus. Computer centers are also equipped with Wi-Fi. In our campus labs, library, and classrooms are huge to accommodate a number of students together. But there are no ACs in the classrooms which creates difficulty during summers. Only 2-3 fans are available in such a big classroom. Canteen and cafeteria are also there in the campus. They provide good hygienic food. Cleanliness is key feature of our campus, workers come regularly to ...

reviews.review_heading: It has an amazing infrastructure and a campus with many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is beautiful. It's been cleaned on a regular basis. The infrastructure is quite amazing. They focus a lot on planting new trees and plants, which has led to beautiful gardens to sit around. The greenery is mesmerizing. The hostel is good. It's open and very clean. The rooms have separate washrooms, so people don't have to share common ones, which is quite hygienic. Wi-Fi is available over the entire campus. The mess facilities are not good these days with the regular changing of the s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri C.J. Patel College of Computer StudiesReviewed on 7 Dec 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri C.J. Patel College of Computer Studies.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a well-equipped infrastructure. Our campus has a playground and well-equipped computer labs. Our college has a good sort of cleanliness. Our classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners. Our college has a high-speed Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 1 May 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in rooms are not much good. Wi-Fi is not provided. The in-time of the hostel is 7 pm. If any student is not in their room, a message will be sent to their parents. The quality of facilities in our hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available.

college_info.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.

There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

A total of six scholarships are offered at Sankalchand Patel University for ST students. The family income should be between INR 2.50 lakh-INR 4.50 Lacs as per respective scholarship. Student can check the table below for more details:

Aspirants who wish to avail  the Sankalchand Patel University scholarship for BSc need to ensure they possess the necessary eligibility criteria. The university provides numerous scholarships in order to extend financial assistance to eligible candidates. Aspirants interested in get the scholarship can visit the official website. The university also provides Gujarat government scholarships.

overview_faqs.question: Is IAMR Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: IAMR Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for MBA/PGDM, BBA, BCA, B.Sc., BPT, M.Sc., MPT, B.A., B.Ed. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Teaching & Education. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. IAMR Group of Institutions has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 4.2 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is IAMR Group of Institutions degree valid?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, any degree obtained from IAMR Group of Institutions is valid and widely accepted across the country. The institution is recognised by AICTE, Bar Council of India, IAP, IIC Delhi, NCTE and UGC in addition to being affiliated to various universities, such as AKTU, CCSU, ABVMU, etc. Students can get all the latest information about the college's courses and their degrees by visiting the official website of the institution.

review_summary.college_name: IAMR Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A campus of possibilities: My experience at IAMR.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies such as Dabur, Yakult, Mother Dairy, and Bisleri offer placement opportunities for students. About 55% of students secure placements based on their overall academic performance. Microbiology students often find positions in well-known pathology labs. Internships are available in research centers for both biotechnology and microbiology students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped biotechnology, microbiology labs, and dry labs for bioinformatics. Classrooms are well furnished clean, and ventilated. The library provides excellent support for research and learning. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided. The canteen food is also worth it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is really good if you want to receive the best education.

content.Placements: The placement of our college is totally dependent on your skill and knowledge. If you have good skills and knowledge, you can get the best placement. So overall, the placement system depends on you, but the college also tries to improve your skills and knowledge so that you can get the best job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is also good, and the campus is enjoyable to walk around. The infrastructure facilities are provided according to our needs, so overall, the infrastructure is best. We love our college campus and everything about it.

content.Infrastructure: We have good classrooms and sufficient grounds for playing. There's a good nature view with trees and a garden area. Some additional clubs are there apart from studies, where we can show our talents. For exams, we take books from the library and prepare from those books.

Various reputed companies like Accenture, City Bank, etc., have also visited this campus for placements.

Our campus has a free Wi-Fi facility, and the range and speed of Wi-Fi are also very good. Hostels in this college are very clean, and there are hostels for both girls and boys.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because placements, faculty members and environment are good.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed. In our course, the highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, the average salary package offered is 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Infosys, HCL, Agile and IBM. Almost 70% of the students got an internship from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are provided for students such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, playground, medical facilities, canteen and sports and games. There are good facilities in our college hostel, mess, canteen, medical facilities and sports and games. I am very happy with our college.

admission_overview.title: IAMR Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IAMR Group of Institutions admissions are a blend of both merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the institution need to ensure that they meet the course-specific admission criteria of the desired programme. The institute offers a wide range of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels across several fields, such as Applied Sciences, Physiotherapy, Computer Applications, Management, Law, Education, and more. Students may get selected either on the basis of academic merit or on an entrance basis, depending on the course and norms set by the institute. IAMR Group of Institutions offers courses via its various institutes/ colleges. The application process for the institute commences online. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses and their respective admission criteria and procedures.

admission_process.title: IAMR Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IAMR Group of Institutionsadmissionis based on merit scores of the students in the last qualifying exam or course-level entrances accepted by it. The institution offers various programmes at the UG and PG levels. These are offered in multiple streams, such as Medicine and Health Sciences,Business and Management Studies, IT and Software,Mass Communication and Media, Science and Teaching and Education. The application process for the institute generally commences online; however, offline applications may also be accepted. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepIAMR Group of Institutionsadmission processexplained below:
Step 1: Check your eligibility

The first step requires students to check the admission criteria of the desired programme. Students can either visit the official website of the institute or the college campus to obtain the latest information.
Step 2: Apply for the desired course

Eligible students can then visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired programme by filling out the application form available online. The website mentions the detailed admission process of each course. For some courses, students may need to register for state-level counselling, while for courses such as LLB, students need to register at CCSU's website.
Step 3: Selection Rounds and Shortlisting

Students are selected on the basis of several parameters. The institution selects students who meet both the general eligibility and the course-specific selection criteria. Students are either selected based on their academic merit or scores obtained in the accepted entrance test. Further selection rounds, such as a Personal Interview, are also conducted for selective courses.
Step 4: Document Verification & Admission confirmation
Selected students need to go through document verification and pay theIAMR Group of Institutions feesto secure their spots at the institute.Download IAMR Group of Institutions LAW Brochure

reviews.review_heading: A campus of possibilities: My experience at IAMR.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped biotechnology, microbiology labs, and dry labs for bioinformatics. Classrooms are well furnished clean, and ventilated. The library provides excellent support for research and learning. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided. The canteen food is also worth it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is really good if you want to receive the best education.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is also good, and the campus is enjoyable to walk around. The infrastructure facilities are provided according to our needs, so overall, the infrastructure is best. We love our college campus and everything about it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IAMR Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: We have good classrooms and sufficient grounds for playing. There's a good nature view with trees and a garden area. Some additional clubs are there apart from studies, where we can show our talents. For exams, we take books from the library and prepare from those books.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best MBA college in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. This college has well build blocks and all the facilities which a management college requires. Our campus has a free Wi-Fi facility, and the range and speed of Wi-Fi are also very good. Hostels in this college are very clean, and there are hostels for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because placements, faculty members and environment are good.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided for students such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, playground, medical facilities, canteen and sports and games. There are good facilities in our college hostel, mess, canteen, medical facilities and sports and games. I am very happy with our college.

reviews.review_heading: A review on Institute of Advanced Management and Research.
reviews.review_text: The college has an average infrastructure. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Many types of gaming products are provided by the campus. The library is the best part of our education because from there, I learned many new things that are helpful in the corporate world after getting placed.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome experience here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, smart class, delicious food, 24X7 light, and Wi-Fi connection are there. In hostel, the warden and all workers are very kind and very helpful. Make memories in hostel life and always remember.  The landmark location of the college is very easy to reach on this location.

reviews.review_heading: Really very good and fantastic .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of college is good
There are good classrooms and also classroom are neat and clean 
And also college Wi-Fi is working properly in classroom but in some different area Wi-Fi not connection due to lack of signal 
But foods items are good in our mess.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college that provides all facilities at a minimum fee.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There is a studio for media students. The quality of food in the canteen is good. All students are allowed to participate in other activities, which makes them capable of doing everything.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the fee structure and placements after completion of our course.

review_content.Placements: Around 5-6% of students are placed. The average salary pacakge is Rs 80,000, and the lowest salary pacakge offered is 16 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered is 8 LPA, and the highest is up to 1 crore because after becoming a doctor it depends on students' passion and hard work. Apollo, Fortis, Majenta, and many others may start their hospital all admitted students, all from the government of India. The top roles offered are junior resident, chief medical officer, and senior resident.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic block for classes and well-maintained lecture theater for lectures, well-equipped hospital with many JR, SR, professor, and chief medical officer, with surgery and gynecology department. The mess food is good in taste and made with hygiene. The playground and all games equipment are provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average medical College in UP and is developing slowly. But the infrastructure is not good.

review_content.Placements: About 5-6% of the students got placed in the MBBS course. The lowest salary offered after this course is approximately Rs.50,000- Rs. 90,000 per month, but after doing PG Super specialty than average package is 2.5 lacs to 4 lacs per month. All the students are doing internships after they clear the semesters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this is not well developed. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs are completed for the first year but labs for other years are not completed. Classrooms are well prepared. Sitting capacity is good and comfortable. Mess food is not good, and sports are not available.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Badaun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This is very good college for medical students.

content.Placements: Good doctors are coming from my college. 70,000 per month is average package of GMC, Badaun. All pass out student get placed. Government provides job for pass out students. There is mandatory internship. The students may get PG Doctor seat and become specilist doctor.
content.Infrastructure: There is quite good infrastructure. Hostel provided by government. There is separate library and reading room. Good hostel for both girls and boys. Sports and game organised annually by college students. Mess is within the hostel and mess food is clean.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placement and a bright future.

content.Placements: 100 seats are there in college, all are placed in government hospitals as medical officer there is handsome salary of about 85000 there is no problem in finding job, All private sector hospital are ready to hire a MBBS graduate 50 thousands to 150000 are offered to each candidate .
content.Infrastructure: Academic block hospital area all labs are well prepared library is present all lt are well maintained, well ventilated rooms are there, lt are fully air conditioning, Wi-Fi is not available Mess is there, but it is so, not very good food is present .

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the fee structure and placements after completion of our course.

content.Placements: Around 5-6% of students are placed. The average salary pacakge is Rs 80,000, and the lowest salary pacakge offered is 16 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered is 8 LPA, and the highest is up to 1 crore because after becoming a doctor it depends on students' passion and hard work. Apollo, Fortis, Majenta, and many others may start their hospital all admitted students, all from the government of India. The top roles offered are junior resident, chief medical officer, and senior resident.
content.Infrastructure: Academic block for classes and well-maintained lecture theater for lectures, well-equipped hospital with many JR, SR, professor, and chief medical officer, with surgery and gynecology department. The mess food is good in taste and made with hygiene. The playground and all games equipment are provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an average medical College in UP and is developing slowly. But the infrastructure is not good.

content.Placements: About 5-6% of the students got placed in the MBBS course. The lowest salary offered after this course is approximately Rs.50,000- Rs. 90,000 per month, but after doing PG Super specialty than average package is 2.5 lacs to 4 lacs per month. All the students are doing internships after they clear the semesters.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this is not well developed. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs are completed for the first year but labs for other years are not completed. Classrooms are well prepared. Sitting capacity is good and comfortable. Mess food is not good, and sports are not available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the infrastructure, well-educated faculty members, and good facilities.

content.Placements: We are 100 students in a batch of the first year as a first batch of the college. MBBS college doesn't have such kind of placements as engineering colleges, but doctors have opportunities to do their JR ship from the college OPD.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is currently under construction. Labs are not much maintained, but things are enough to get your MBBS done. Classrooms are well maintained and fully air-conditioned. Library is good but missing some books. There is no Wi-Fi given to the students. Hotels are well maintained. A good electricity supply is provided. Mess quality is not that much good. Even there is no canteen at present. The sports ground is also under construction.

placements.overview: PG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year PG Degree, a total of 18 students were admitted at Vinayaka Mission's Sankarachariyar Dental College, Salem, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation and 18 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 18 students 18 were placed with median salary of INR 960000. A total of 18 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year PG degree at Vinayaka Mission's Sankarachariyar Dental College, Salem, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundationand 16 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 16 students 16 were placed with median salary of INR 969600.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vinayaka Mission's Sankarachariyar Dental College, Salem, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 30,000 to 43,50,000. UG programs include BDS and UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include MDS.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and patient flow.

review_content.Placements: About 95-100% of students got placements. Top recruiting company for my course offered leadership peer mentors, research opportunities, knowledge faculty members, lab facilities, events, extra computer courses, new creativity of thinking, and assessment tests. It is a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food quality is good. The department has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities. Mess food is decent and canteen is better. Medical aid is available. Sports and games are encouraged.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and I am satisfied with its faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Around 80% of students got internships in this course. The top role offered is dental surgeon.
review_content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available in both girls' and boys' hostels. There is a decent library in this college. Hostels are well maintained. All departments are maintained well. Canteen is very good. Medical facilities are excellent. Sports and games are conducted. Laboratory is well maintained with safety precautions.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are qualified, knowledgeable, and helpful. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are difficult. We can score good marks if faculty members help us properly.

review_content.Placements: The placement is very good. It has its hospital, and a good, handful amount of stipend is provided during the internship, around 23k. The OPD has good patient inflow every day and has a 100-bed IPD with the general ward, as well as AC and non-AC rooms available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. The UG building is separate, where all the UG academics are held. The PG building is separate, and the pharmacy building is also separate. It has a big area and many gardens for herbs and trees. It has a very large ground and a decent hostel. It has a well-established central library, well-equipped with AC, and all the books are available. It also has a badminton court and a very good auditorium.

review_content.Placements: It is a medical college, so one year of internship is mandatory, where we get the salary or pay. After that, you are dependent on your own for your job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every facility is provided, including a hostel, canteen, medical facilities, and a guest room for foreigners. Sports area is fully developed. Labs are fully equipped, and teachers are very supportive there. There is also a dissection hall containing a cadaver and many preserved organs.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am very lucky to get admission in this college because of our teachers and real knowledge of life.

content.Placements: 94 student seats are available for excellence. Packages of 3 LPA, 2.5 LPA, and 50,000 are offered by companies like Baidhyanath, Vyas, and Dang Pharmacy. In our college, many students come for internships because of the high exposure to different patients. Nowadays, research and student startup programmes are highly encouraged.
content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library and digital projectors for studies. We also have programmes like Sports Week, Annual Function, Navaratri, Fresher Parties, etc. Yoga, Sanskrit Pathshala, extra-curricular lectures, and youth festivals define the beauty of arts. Along with studies, we participate in different activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Modern infrastructure and supportive faculty, placement opportunities vary.

content.Placements: I am pursuing my degree. Mostly, students were placed in an average salary of nearly 9.6 LPA. Many got roles like software developers and Data analysts, and about 60 to 70% secured internships. College had good faculty, a peaceful green campus, and a well-stocked library that supported our learning.
content.Infrastructure: KIRC has good infrastructure with clean classrooms, projectors, Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs. Library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostel rooms are furnished, and mess offers hygienic food. A canteen with affordable snacks is also available. Medical help is on campus. Sports like cricket, volleyball, and indoor games are encouraged, and a sports week is held yearly. Green campus adds to pleasant environment.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our is really good in providing knowledge of Ayurveda.

content.Placements: The placement is very good. It has its hospital, and a good, handful amount of stipend is provided during the internship, around 23k. The OPD has good patient inflow every day and has a 100-bed IPD with the general ward, as well as AC and non-AC rooms available.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. The UG building is separate, where all the UG academics are held. The PG building is separate, and the pharmacy building is also separate. It has a big area and many gardens for herbs and trees. It has a very large ground and a decent hostel. It has a well-established central library, well-equipped with AC, and all the books are available. It also has a badminton court and a very good auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good, and hostels are undergoing construction

content.Placements: It is a medical college, so one year of internship is mandatory, where we get the salary or pay. In the last year, after completing 4.5 years of study, one undergoes an internship at the college hospital, and there is a decent amount of patient flow. After that, you are dependent on your own for your job.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is provided, including a hostel, canteen, medical facilities, and a guest room for foreigners. Sports area is fully developed. Labs are fully equipped, and teachers are very supportive there. There is also a dissection hall containing a cadaver and many preserved organs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it has average infrastructure but good studies and practicals.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are not very common as most students prefer to start their own private practice or work in multi-specialty hospitals. There is not a structured campus placement drive. Students do get job opportunities in reputed hospitals. The majority of graduates are not unemployed, as they either join hospitals for experience or their own clinics. The average package varies based on specialisation and location. Many students manage to secure a career in the healthcare system.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has average quality of infrastructure and hostel. Classrooms and labs have enough instruments. Classrooms have a display speaker, mic, and Wi-Fi. Phones are not allowed in classrooms, but teachers prepare PPT presentations and teach with them. Phones in classrooms are distracting so they are not allowed.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gujarat Ayurveda University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 2 hostels for PG students and the total number of inmates capacity in PG Hostels (Boys and Girls) is 172. And  2 hostels for overseas students with the total number of inmates capacity is 44. Hostel facility is not available in the campus. 24 hours drinking water facility through Aqua guards on each floor to all hostels. WLAN facility is also available. International hostel having AC and attached with Kitchen and all basic facilities including Geyser, racks, cots, mattress, ceiling fan, etc.

library.description: University has a well established and RFID managed Library with a collection of more than 30,000 books on various subjects. The library also has a huge collection of manuscripts in different languages that are being preserved through digitization. SOUL SoftWare designed by INFLIBNET (UGC) Ahmadabad was purchased for Library and 2.0 Version installation and RFID System is implemented in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Volleyball Court, Athletics Track, Table Tennis

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Akhandanand Ayurved CollegeReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very lucky to get admission in this college because of our teachers and real knowledge of life.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library and digital projectors for studies. We also have programmes like Sports Week, Annual Function, Navaratri, Fresher Parties, etc. Yoga, Sanskrit Pathshala, extra-curricular lectures, and youth festivals define the beauty of arts. Along with studies, we participate in different activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Kalol Institute and Research CenterReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Modern infrastructure and supportive faculty, placement opportunities vary.
reviews.review_text: KIRC has good infrastructure with clean classrooms, projectors, Wi-Fi, and well-equipped labs. Library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostel rooms are furnished, and mess offers hygienic food. A canteen with affordable snacks is also available. Medical help is on campus. Sports like cricket, volleyball, and indoor games are encouraged, and a sports week is held yearly. Green campus adds to pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: Our is really good in providing knowledge of Ayurveda.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. The UG building is separate, where all the UG academics are held. The PG building is separate, and the pharmacy building is also separate. It has a big area and many gardens for herbs and trees. It has a very large ground and a decent hostel. It has a well-established central library, well-equipped with AC, and all the books are available. It also has a badminton court and a very good auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda, Gujarat Ayurveda UniversityReviewed on 8 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good, and hostels are undergoing construction
reviews.review_text: Every facility is provided, including a hostel, canteen, medical facilities, and a guest room for foreigners. Sports area is fully developed. Labs are fully equipped, and teachers are very supportive there. There is also a dissection hall containing a cadaver and many preserved organs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Eva College of AyurvedReviewed on 7 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it has average infrastructure but good studies and practicals.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average quality of infrastructure and hostel. Classrooms and labs have enough instruments. Classrooms have a display speaker, mic, and Wi-Fi. Phones are not allowed in classrooms, but teachers prepare PPT presentations and teach with them. Phones in classrooms are distracting so they are not allowed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swaminarayan UniversityReviewed on 19 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review of college.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best, in fact, great infrastructure, with a 7-floor building and two lifts. It also has a big classroom equipped with projectors. The campus has one large central library that is well-equipped with books, and every classroom has an AC in working condition.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Bhargava Ayurveda Medical CollegeReviewed on 8 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college with best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have an e-library and library. We have no Wi-Fi facility. Labs are clean and digital classrooms are available. Faculty members also use Wi-Fi and labs. Faculty members also use classrooms for him. Faculty members also use a library for us and make PPTs for learning. They do their best.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Manjushree Research Institute of Ayurvedic ScienceReviewed on 14 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure is there.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, with very clean rooms and washrooms. The food in the canteen is very good, and medical facilities are available 24/7. There is a separate sports weak of 2-3 days every year. Large Hall for library purposes with rules are there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by State Model Institute of Ayurveda SciencesReviewed on 31 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus and hostel building structure are very good compared to other colleges. It also has a big library and classrooms. Our class capacity is around 130, but our batch is only 75 every year. In every hostel room, there are 3 students per room. Each student has one table, chair, and B.Ed cupboard.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Indian Institute of Ayurved Research and HospitalReviewed on 20 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very nice college for Ayurved.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have that much good facilities. I mean, there is a transportation issue in our college. There is also an issue with the number of books in the library. The canteen of our college is also not that much developed. But yes, all the departments are well organized.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Swaminarayan UniversityReviewed on 17 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: About infrastructure and facility you can SEE in our photos.
reviews.review_text: Water supply, solar system, coolers, etc. Medical facilities are good for emergency purposes, and regarding sports, we have a TT table and gymnasium for physical workouts. Healthy food is provided by our mess. There are 2 to 3 messes in our campus for lunch and dinner.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Netra Chikitsa Trust Ayurveda CollegeReviewed on 9 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading:
"Qualified Faculty, Practical Curriculum, and Supportive Facilities for Ayurveda Students"
.
reviews.review_text: The Ayurveda college offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a library with extensive resources and practical training facilities. Hostel rooms are decent, food in the mess is hygienic though basic. Medical facilities are accessible and sports options are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda, Gujarat Ayurveda UniversityReviewed on 6 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolute satisfied with the facilities and really good infrastructure and atmosphere!
reviews.review_text: The college provides a vast infrastructure, including labs, classrooms, a library, a hostel, a playground, and a botanical garden as well. Many curricular activities are performed, such as games and sports, free medical facilities for students, and many more. It is a nice place to be.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Swaminarayan UniversityReviewed on 19 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The best and experience college.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities and infrastructure are available BSC in microbiology such as  wi-fi, best lab technology, very Big class room and library. Hostel is very best and experienced. Mess is there in hostel but they do not not add garlic and onion in food. Cricket, volleyball, football ground is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Manjushree Research Institute of Ayurvedic ScienceReviewed on 17 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: really good infrastructure and teaching staff
reviews.review_text: The B.A.M.S course is 4.5 year course which divided into 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th year. All have their own classroom the classroom is equipped with modern infrastructure like mic, speaker, stage, level wise sitting arrangement, benches, a fully air conditioned classroom, projector. The classroom has capacity to have 100 students. They have different labs according to subject like Anatomy, physiology, pharmacology, toxicology and etc. and equipped with all necessary models and equipment to learn ind...

The college extends seven specialisations in BSc, six in BA and two specialisations each under BVoc and BBA. The course duration of all the UG programmes is three years. DYPACSC offers BA, BSc and BCom under two categories: Aided and Non-aided. At PG level, the institute offers MSc in five specialisations, MA in three and MCom in two specialisations. faqs.question: Q: What is the fees for BBA course at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College

faqs.answer: Regarding Admission Cancellation by Students: For Undergraduate programs such as BBA and B.Sc.-HS, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1100 is deemed non-refundable. Similarly, for Master's Programs like MBA, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1500 is non-refundable. Refund Policy: Within the initial 10 days of enrollment (post-fee payment), a full refund of 100% is applicable. From the 11th day until the commencement of the session, deductions are made at the rate of Rs. 1000 towards administrative charges, with the remainder refunded. No refunds are issued once the session begins (in January and July), and fees are expected to be paid in full. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA course at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College
overview_faqs.answer: The total fee for the Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) course at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College, Pimpri, Pune is INR 2,07,255, including a hostel fee of INR 5,40,000. The first-year fee is INR 63,910, and the college also offers an application form fee of INR 33,180 In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more. To learn more you can also contact the admission department

overview_faqs.question: What are people's opinions on Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College for B.Sc?
overview_faqs.answer: Dr. D.Y. Patil college is famous and reputed college for under-graduation specially for Bsc.Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College is very good for BBA . Faculty wise, it is very good all the faculty members are very knowledgeable and helpful . It has good infrastructue and indoor - outdoor sports facilities . College also have good internet connection in library and labs .Apart from all that if students have good skill than he/she can secure good package from college.

overview_faqs.question: Does Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Regarding Admission Cancellation by Students: For Undergraduate programs such as BBA and B.Sc.-HS, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1100 is deemed non-refundable. Similarly, for Master's Programs like MBA, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1500 is non-refundable. Refund Policy: Within the initial 10 days of enrollment (post-fee payment), a full refund of 100% is applicable. From the 11th day until the commencement of the session, deductions are made at the rate of Rs. 1000 towards administrative charges, with the remainder refunded. No refunds are issued once the session begins (in January and July), and fees are expected to be paid in full. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Sc at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee structure for a B.Sc at Dr D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College is 20,300 (1st year fee). The fee structure is divided into two parts the student can pay his or her fee twice in a year. The admission process is very satisfying and easy because the staff present there is well supportive of students from every category. There are different kinds of scholarships available for category students. In addition you can contact the admission department for further information

review_summary.college_name: Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dr. D. Y. Patil ACS College - Empowering education in arts, commerce, and science.

content.Placements: 70-100% of students got placed. The lowest salary is 1 LPA. The average salary is 3 LPA - 10 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Syngenta, Capera, Capcut, Canva, Google, Amazon, AWS, and Infosys. 60-65% of students got internships at TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Capcut, Canva, and Capera. Roles offered are data analyst, junior analyst, business analyst, and network officer.
content.Infrastructure: It's quite good and the experience of the college is really next level. Though there is some shortage of sports and games, but the given facilities are top-notch. The quality of canteen food is also really tasty and craving. I like it and always whenever I go to eat there, I always have maggi with black coffee.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: It was very good. Many multinational companies came for placements, and offers were also good. But, the college didn't have a very strong placement record overall, it was average. The percentage of students getting placed each year was about 40%. Companies that visited the college included Infosys and others. The average package was 2–3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I resided at my home, so I commuted to the college daily and did not know about the hostel facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure, excellent teachers, and coordinated staff members.

content.Placements: A high number of students got placements this year. The highest package this year ranges from 9-10 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Companies like Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, etc., visit the college to hire students. A high number of students got internships in companies like Wipro and TCS. A few students got internships at Cognizant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and toilets are very clean. Overall, it is an A+ grade in my opinion.
content.Faculty: Teachers are one of the most helpful things that happened to me in college. They are the only reason that I got great grades in my academics. The course curriculum is accurate and relevant. It does make students market-ready because of the knowledge that is provided in the college. Faculty members and staff members are very respectful and responsible. They are very experienced and provide great knowledge according to courses.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.

content.Placements: A high percentage of students get placed in my college. The highest package offered in my course for students is 18 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies visit the college to hire students from my college. The percentage of students who get internships in this course is more than 80%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in my college are good. Classrooms, a library, and all things are available in this course. The food quality offered in my college to students is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available in this course.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc in Data Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Teaching staff, cleanliness, security, a library, and medical emergency services.

content.Placements: As for placements, the students were eligible from the beginning of the third year (5th semester). Our college has tried working with some good companies like TCS, UST, CTS, Infosys, Zoho, Wipro, and many more. The average package was 6 LPA and the highest was 30 LPA. 90% of the students got placed in our college each year. I was confident that before getting my degree, I would get placed, so after getting my degree, I would continue to work for a year, and after that, I had many other plans that weren't related to any IT department or software.

admission_process.title: Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dr. D Y Patil Arts, Commerce & Science College in Pune offers a range of undergraduate programs including BA, BSc, BCA, BCom, BBA, and BVoc. The BSc program includes seven specialisations, the BA programme includes six, and both the BVoc and BBA programs offer two specialisations each. All undergraduate programs have a duration of three years.Dr. D Y Patil Arts, Commerce & ScienceCollege provides BA, BSc, and BCom courses in two categories: Aided and Non-aided. At the postgraduate level, the college offers an MSc with five specializations, an MA with three, and an MCom with two specialisations, all of which are two years long.

For Dr D YPatil Arts, Commerce & Science College admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toDr D YPatil Arts, Commerce & Science College courses2025:

courses_data.name: Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce and Science BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: For the 2024 academic year, B.Sc. admissions at Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce, and Science College require a minimum of 50% in the class 12 board exam for general applicants, with reduced cutoffs of 45% for OBC, SC, and ST categories. Admission is based on class 12 percentages in Physics, Chemistry, Maths, and Biology, with cutoffs varying by course. The college accepts scores from ISC and Maharashtra HSC.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College?
faqs.answer: For BSc in  Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College for Nursing, 100 seats are sanctioned for the academic year 2024-25 while for BSc Computer Science it's around 150 and for other B.Sc. programs it's expected to be in this range only but it is not displayed by the institute on the information brochure, advertising materials or  their website.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri?
faqs.answer: As per current year 2024 students in Dr DY Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College get admission on the basis of class 12 percentage in Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology subjects. For the admission in DY Patil college students in BSc minimum 50% in class 12 board examination for applying to B.Sc computer Science. The cutoff varies with different course . Cutoff drops to 45% if the candidates is from reserve categories like OBC, SC and ST.

Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Colleges' category.
