reviews.review_heading: Dr. D. Y. Patil ACS College - Empowering education in arts, commerce, and science.
reviews.review_text: It's quite good and the experience of the college is really next level. Though there is some shortage of sports and games, but the given facilities are top-notch. The quality of canteen food is also really tasty and craving. I like it and always whenever I go to eat there, I always have maggi with black coffee.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: I resided at my home, so I commuted to the college daily and did not know about the hostel facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure, excellent teachers, and coordinated staff members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and toilets are very clean. Overall, it is an A+ grade in my opinion.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are good. Classrooms, a library, and all things are available in this course. The food quality offered in my college to students is good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available in this course.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching staff, cleanliness, security, a library, and medical emergency services.
reviews.review_text: There were not many festival events. Some of them were Navratri Dandiya, Diwali, etc. You could take any book from the library you just needed a library card. You could even take reference books and semester books. There were fair events for sports, but not many. The students got along fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities. They are good. The department is also good. Wi-Fi service is there. There is a lab service. We have many hostel facilities. They are good. I have not taken a hostel pass. It is poor. My friends stay in the hostel. The quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce, and Science, Pimpri.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. The college has Wi-Fi with a password but the connectivity is 0. There is no network on most of the floors. The campus is very small, with a law and women's colleges. The college doesn't have a canteen. I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know much. Rooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are arrogant and egoistic but their knowledge is above par.
reviews.review_text: I have heard that the infrastructure is good. The food, water, and everything are fine, not good but not bad as well. Wi-Fi password is not given to students and it is only for faculty members. The library is amazing with all the academic books. Classrooms are big but the benches are small and broken. There are no sanitary pads in the girl's washrooms and no mirrors to check whether we're appropriately dressed. Washrooms stinks and there is no handwash, no issues, and no hand dryer. There is no ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are present in this course. The infrastructure of this course is so good. Wi-Fi, classroom, and library—everything is present. The food quality made in this college is so good. Medical facilities are present. Sports and games are available in this course.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, likely average, but fine.
reviews.review_text: The campus area is small, but the college infrastructure is likely to be good, and the cleaning and peon staff are also good. The college has many departments such as sports, NCC, NSS, and computers. All the things in the college are average, but some outside students may not find them as good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. DY Patil College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for students in my college are so good. Wi-Fi and classrooms, as well as a library, are available in my college. The quality of food made in the canteen in college is so tasty, and medical facilities are available. However, sports are not available in my course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr DY Patil Pimpri.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Good labs, well-maintained and better classrooms. The library is peaceful and has the required books, also very helpful while studying and during exams. The sports ground is available. Food in the canteen is better than outside, not going to lie. Medical facilities are available in emergencies too.

reviews.review_heading: Form my side college is okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good and peaceful. In front of the college gate, there is a Shree Swami Samarth small temple; it gives very positive vibes. There is good maintenance. Elevators for students and faculty. In our college, there are no hostels.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with educational values and teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college with good infrastructure provides a comprehensive and supportive environment that encourages extracurricular activity. Classrooms were equipped with modern facilities such as projectors, comfortable seating arrangements, big library, and practical rooms.

reviews.review_heading: As I am in my third year right now, I am actually dissatisfied with the college management.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi provided for students. Computer labs are good, classrooms are average, and the library is average too. I don't know much about the hostel as I live with my family, but the computers in the computer lab are much lower than expected. There are a total of 6 labs, and each lab contains nearly 30 computers each.

college_info.college_name: Dr DY Patil ACS College Pimpri Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total fee for the Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) course at Dr. D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College, Pimpri, Pune is INR 2,07,255, including a hostel fee of INR 5,40,000. The first-year fee is INR 63,910, and the college also offers an application form fee of INR 33,180 In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more. To learn more you can also contact the admission department

Yes, Dr. D. Y. Patil ACS College, Pimpri, offers scholarships to BA students. The college offers scholarships to the students on the basis of their merit and economic condition. Check out the names of the scholarships offered by the college:

Regarding Admission Cancellation by Students: For Undergraduate programs such as BBA and B.Sc.-HS, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1100 is deemed non-refundable. Similarly, for Master's Programs like MBA, the Registration Fee of Rs. 1500 is non-refundable. Refund Policy: Within the initial 10 days of enrollment (post-fee payment), a full refund of 100% is applicable. From the 11th day until the commencement of the session, deductions are made at the rate of Rs. 1000 towards administrative charges, with the remainder refunded. No refunds are issued once the session begins (in January and July), and fees are expected to be paid in full. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information.

The fee structure for a B.Sc at Dr D.Y. Patil Arts, Commerce and Science College is 20,300 (1st year fee). The fee structure is divided into two parts the student can pay his or her fee twice in a year. The admission process is very satisfying and easy because the staff present there is well supportive of students from every category. There are different kinds of scholarships available for category students. In addition you can contact the admission department for further information

paragraphs: The admission process for MAEERs Physiotherapy College starts with an eligibility check followed by the other rounds. This includes application, selection process, and admission confirmation. Students have to go through all the steps to get a seat at the college. Interested students can follow the steps given below to completeMAEERs Physiotherapy College admission process:
Application Process 2026

Interested students can go to the official site of the college to apply online. Students can also go to theMAEERs Physiotherapy College admission officefor offline process. The application form has to be submitted with documents and application fees.
Selection Process

Students at MAEERs Physiotherapy College are selected on an entrance basis. Students have to clear both the eligibility and selection rounds to get a seat. TheMAEERs Physiotherapy College admission criteriais as below:
The college also reserves around 15% of the intake under the NRI/ Management quota.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students have to report at the college for verification of documents. To complete the process, students have to pay the MAEERs Physiotherapy College admission fees.

The MAEERs Physiotherapy College fee structure can include different components. This includes tuition fees, caution deposit, exam fees, library fees, lab fees, and more. Some of these are charged only once at the time of admission. The remaining are charged either annually or semester-wise. Students can check below to know about theMAEERs Physiotherapy College fees:

college_info.college_name: Corporate Group of Institutions: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Corporate Group of Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Corporate Group of Institutions programmes is around INR 28,500 to 7,98,750.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. Everyone takes admission if you want to success in your life.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 60% of students are selected for the placement every year. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and more multinational companies come to this college, and students get placed. Also, the companies provide work from home for sometimes in any kind of emergency. Placements are quite good.
review_content.Infrastructure: I give 4 out of 5 stars for infrastructure as this college has big buildings and so many classrooms. Every department has a unique classroom like CSE, AIML, etc. It has separate classes. This college also provides many event organisations for entertainment for studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: MY insight for college Bhopal .

review_content.Placements: From the third semester, students become eligible for campus placement. Companies like Google, Microsoft, B Pharmaceutical, Pharmacies classes, and Pinna Plus visit our college. The highest average package as per the company offered in our college is 20,00,000 per annum. The percentage of students getting placements is normal, like 60 to 70%. My plans after getting my degree are to start my own business. I will take my own agency and start my business.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides us with different types of festivals in our college like Garba, Diwali, Holi, Christmas, and New Year. Our library is not that good. I can see that the library is too small, and the books are also not that many. The faculty in class is very strict with the students, but also polite while teaching. In our college, sports and extra activities are not that good. I can't see any sports activities in our college. There are a few trends where social groups and clubs are run by students, and they are getting a lot of followers from the college and influencing a few students as well.

review_summary.college_name: Corporate Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for the B. Pharmacy.

content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in my course. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 2 LPA, and average package is 2.5 LPA - 3.5 LPA. Deloitte is top recruiting company who have visited my college for my course. 50% of students got internships from my course in Accenture. The top most role offered in my course is employed in corporate office.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure related to Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. All are decent to good, not extraordinary but helpful. Wi-Fi is available for a limited period of time. Library is also good. Classrooms are air-conditioned, and there are good amount of labs also present there. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen in my course is also acceptable, with a good medical support staff and a large ground available for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Build the concept with quality education and training based on practical things.

content.Placements: Everything is good at this college; having experienced all aspects, I can say that companies like Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc., come here. The highest package is approximately 6.5 lakhs per annum and is totally based on your skills. All departments are available, and I have chosen the AI & ML branch.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are equipped with all the necessary facilities and are well-ventilated and digitally facilitated. You need not worry about any aspect of the campus infrastructure, as water purifiers and coolers are installed on every floor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. Everyone takes admission if you want to success in your life.

content.Placements: Approximately 60% of students are selected for the placement every year. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and more multinational companies come to this college, and students get placed. Also, the companies provide work from home for sometimes in any kind of emergency. Placements are quite good.
content.Infrastructure: I give 4 out of 5 stars for infrastructure as this college has big buildings and so many classrooms. Every department has a unique classroom like CSE, AIML, etc. It has separate classes. This college also provides many event organisations for entertainment for studies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: MY insight for college Bhopal .

content.Placements: From the third semester, students become eligible for campus placement. Companies like Google, Microsoft, B Pharmaceutical, Pharmacies classes, and Pinna Plus visit our college. The highest average package as per the company offered in our college is 20,00,000 per annum. The percentage of students getting placements is normal, like 60 to 70%. My plans after getting my degree are to start my own business. I will take my own agency and start my business.
content.Infrastructure: College provides us with different types of festivals in our college like Garba, Diwali, Holi, Christmas, and New Year. Our library is not that good. I can see that the library is too small, and the books are also not that many. The faculty in class is very strict with the students, but also polite while teaching. In our college, sports and extra activities are not that good. I can't see any sports activities in our college. There are a few trends where social groups and clubs are run by students, and they are getting a lot of followers from the college and influencing a few students as well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend this college to students who want good studies.

content.Placements: There is no proper placement cell in this college. They take training and placement fees but do not provide any placement support. No student is placed from the college as no interviews are conducted. There are no packages or recruiting companies. No internships are provided except for one college internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. There is no proper Wi-Fi in labs. Classrooms are also not good. Library is good. Hostel facilities are the worst, and hostel food is very bad.
content.Faculty: No proper exams are conducted. All teachers are biased. Teachers are not good in this college and do not provide proper guidance for course. Faculty also lack teaching quality. This college does not prepare students to be industry-ready, instead, they treat students like working cows. College semester exams feel like giving LKG-level exams.

Corporate Group of Institutions course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theCorporate Group of Institutionsapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Corporate Group of Institutions courses, students can visit the website.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 10 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Placement, Infrastructure, Facilities
reviews.review_text: Life on campus is so good. They celebrate many fests. There is a fest week. They give the name of the week as colorful week. In the fest, different programs are conducted by the college for the students. It is so good. The fee structure for the total amount of one year is 114,000. And the bus fee is 15,000 for those who live in Bhopal. Students living outside Bhopal pay 20,000 bus fee. You pay 114,000 in two installments: the first time you pay 4,500, and the second time you pay 61,000.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 8 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Corporate group of institutions review.
reviews.review_text: The annual function is conducted, and fest was also conducted in which famous singer Shilpa Rao came to entertain the youth. The range and accessibility of books and journals available in the library are very good. We get availability of all the books. Sports and extracurricular activities are offered on campus, and many WhatsApp groups provide information about them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 25 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: You should go for pharmacy course in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good. I used to live far from college, my college bus used to come there. Facilites are average too. Laboratories are average too, hostels are present in the campus. Most of the students are from Bihar, Jharkhand, Uttar Pradesh and locals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 3 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good facilities. Placement was neither so good nor so bad.
reviews.review_text: In my college there is a lot of digital facilities like Wi-Fi computer classes, classroom, digital classroom, CCTV camera for security libraries, labs, water cooler, lift, Canteen is also good, hostel is good, play ground, ayurveda plants and garden etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members and good placements in 2019 and previous years.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities and infrastructure were excellent and outstanding. There were labs, classrooms, and a good library. In our college, a hostel was available. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities sports and games were available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)

Wi-Fi facilities are only available in labs and only for faculty members and staff. Hostel provides us good facilities. Mess food is also not that bad, it's manageable but sports facilities are very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: My personal experience is that if you do engineering try to take admission in government.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not bad, it is well. The Wi-Fi facilities are available and the classroom is smart. In the hostel some facilities are good but not all facilities are good. Medical facilities are not available and the quality of food is also not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 8 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has nice faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with Wi-Fi but not in working condition. Classrooms are too cleaned. Labs are available. Library has all the editions with good facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Corporate Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 13 Jan 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Corporate Institute of Science and Technology.

reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in our course and hostel. There is a separate department for each year student in the 1st year. There is a good library. The campus and hostel are Wi-Fi enabled. The quality of the food served is better than other college hostels. Medical facilities and sports zone areas are also available here.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Navodaya Medical College is approximately INR 309108 - INR 3791778.

faqs.answer: A:    Navodaya Medical College is a well-known institution for B.Sc, MBBS, MD, MS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Navodaya Medical College has course specializations in Medical Laboratory Technology, Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Radiology, Community Medicine, Anatomy, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Navodaya Medical College?

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and environment friendly campus .

review_content.Placements: Nice college and the best environmentally friendly campus and the best professors for teaching. The placements are also available in the same college where you study; you can work in their hospital only. For example, if we complete our internship later on based on our MBBS degree, we can work in the teaching department for our experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel stay is very good. Each room is shared by 2 persons. There are also normal non-AC hostels and 2 AC hostels for UG candidates, and there is an AC hostel facility for all PG students. The UG students from 1st year stay in the hostel, which is outside of campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: An insight to Navodaya Medical College, Raichur.

review_content.Placements: Actually, we are becoming doctors, so after getting a degree, we can work in private hospitals & clinics for a minimum 20k per month, & we can pursue PG in the MBBS after giving the NEET PG entrance examination. On the basis of passing percentage, almost 80-90% of students get their degree in the batch. Internship is provided in the medical hospital in the same college for one year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The academic classrooms are centralized. AC & projectors are being installed with advanced technologies for better teaching in the classrooms. The practical labs of different departments are well-equipped with the instruments & objects for which students can learn & use the knowledge in their future endeavors. The campus has a central library that has almost all research papers related to the medical field & books of different authors. The presence of a digital library also helps to get study materials from online.

review_content.Placements: It is a very good college. The patient flow is not good. Our college provides good education.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Our campus has good environment. We have a great library in this college. Hostel facilities are great. There is some problem regarding the water facility. Hospital is not available. Laboratories are better. Sports are conducted. The food quality is very good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are helpful. We should learn every day as we know no one spoon-feeds like PUC College. The teaching quality is good. They also provide in-depth knowledge. Internal exams and weekly tests are conducted.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

overview_faqs.question: Can Navodaya Medical College be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Navodaya Medical College is a distinguished institution offering B.Sc, MBBS, MD, MS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Navodaya Medical College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Navodaya Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 3.67 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 3.67 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

In this section, Navodaya Medical College Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Navodaya Medical College. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 78388 for MBBS.

Navodaya Medical College cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Navodaya Medical College MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Radio Diagnosis with a closing cutoff rank of 3327 for the General AI category candidates.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our campus has good environment. We have a great library in this college. Hostel facilities are great. There is some problem regarding the water facility. Hospital is not available. Laboratories are better. Sports are conducted. The food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great campus with generous professors and every amenity.
reviews.review_text: Our library is Asia's the largest and the most resourceful place for studying and learning with divided sections and every book possible that one needs with a computer room and an auditorium for discussions. The cafeteria in the library is also a necessity.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty much dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really very good. There is no provision of Wi-Fi though we are charged for the internet in the fee. Classrooms are gallery classrooms and are very good. Food at canteen is manageable. Library is good. Hostels are very unhygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and studies are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are average, but sports and other facilities are good. If students are interested in various types of sports, then they can choose sports according to their choice and can do the practice. Intra-college sports competitions and university-based competitions are also arranged here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite good, and the faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite large and good. It is a lush green campus, and there are around 4 lecture halls. Each department has separate laboratories and demo rooms, and rooms are well-ventilated. Hostels are separate for boys and girls, and there are also separate hostels for postgraduates. Our college has attached hospital.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: Hospital and college were good. Patient load was less before, but now it may be improved. Hostel and food were average, but it is better than other colleges. I was a day scholar. My hostel friends faced food and all issues, so they joined outside mess.

college_info.intro: Amity University Kolkata offers a variety of programmes. These courses are offered at the graduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Amity University Kolkata is famous for BTech and MBA programmes. The university offers these courses to students for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively. Mechanical Engineering students are taught construction testing, design, and operation of machines and automobiles, etc. The university offers these courses in full-time mode and across several specialisations. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Amity University Kolkata and their respective eligibility, and Amity University Kolkata fee structure:

reviews_list.review_title: Amity Law School is one of the best private law schools in West Bengal.

review_content.Placements: As this is a law course, majority of students here are not first-generation lawyers and often practice with their parents. Amity provides placements in the corporate sector and is very helpful about it. I am not aware of the highest or lowest package offered. Internships are provided by the college, but there are criteria, and not everyone gets them.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is on point, and the best that money can buy. Library is huge, and an entire spare building is allotted for it. You will find all the books you can imagine. College also provides an online e-library that gives you a subscription to SCC online and manupatra.

reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good but academics are not good.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students were placed in our course. Other than this, some students were also recruited for irrelevant jobs. The average package was around 5 LPA. The highest package was about 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Capgemini, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Our college had world class infrastructure. It provided Wi-Fi campus, big classroom, very furnished labs, and library with lots of books. Quality of hostel was also good. Limited sports facility was available. It had basic medical facilities.

Scores obtained in the last qualifying exam will be considered for the selection process. Courses like BCA/BCA (Hons), BBA< BBA LLB (Hons) and MA are merit-based. Direct admission eligibility is a score of a minimum of 80% in Class 12. The minimum eligibility to apply for the UG courses is Class 12 if a minimum of 50% and for PG courses is Graduation.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: In Amity University Kolkata, Application for withdrawal from the course is to be submitted through Amizone. The college not accepts other mode of request. Given below are refund guidelines for withdrawal of application:% of tuition fees paid If Student’s written notice of withdrawal is received: 100%(“Maximum Refund”) More than 60 days before theProgramme Commencement Date 25%Before, but not more than 60 days before theProgramme Commencement Date 10%After, but not more than 7 days after the Programme Commencement Date 5%More than 7 days after the ProgrammeCommencement Date, but not more than 14 daysafter the Programme Commencement Date 0%More than 14 days after the ProgrammeCommencement Date Refund will be processed on receipt of written request from the student. The refund will be made within 45 to 60 days from the date of receipt of refund application

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA courses at Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity University Kolkata MBA fees include many components such as Tuition Fees, Examination Fees, Library Fees, etc. The total fee for course ranges between INR 8.7 lakh and INR 8.9 lakh. However this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are advised to visit official website to learn more about same.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel withdrawal refund guidelines at Amity University Kolkata?
overview_faqs.answer: To withdraw the application from the hostel, candidates must submit their request through Amizone. Hostel fee once paid will not be refunded in case of withdrawal at any point in time. Further, the security deposits will be refunded after adjustment or clearance of any dues, such as the following:Alumni Life Member Fee @1000/- (Compulsory)IT Damage ChargesAdmin Damage ChargesCentral Library ChargesAcademics (Lab, Department Library/book bank, CRC, etc.)Examination DuesID Card Charges Rs. 500/- (If not returned)Any other dues (Gate pass Charges/Duplicate ID Card etc.)

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Professional teachers with good skills.

content.Placements: Some of the emerging companies like L&T, Tata Housing, Godrej, and Sobha Developers took part in the recruitment drive of our college nowadays. But during our time of recruitment, only 5 to 8 companies were involved in recruitment. Various professional architects participated in the webinars to provide some chances for doing internships with their network.
content.Infrastructure: College events like promotions, cultural, and technical fests are conducted twice or thrice a month. A specific set of penalties and punishments is assigned for all the wrong behavior of us. Hostel premises are liberal, but accurate records are maintained. The usage of mobile phones within specified hours is allowed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Amity University Kolkata is really positive.

content.Placements: Percentage of students getting placed is approximately 60 percent in B.Tech computer science. Generally, at Amity University Kolkata students get placed at TCS, Deloitte, EY, SAP, etc. Top role offered in my course is SDE. The highest package is 28 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and average is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Campus of the university is not that huge. It has spread over 15 acres of land. There are two academic blocks such as A and E blocks. The campus is located in the outer area of Kolkata. Classrooms are good. The campus is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Campus has a library consists of more than 10,000 books. Different types of labs such as Matlab, seminar halls, etc., are available. There are two canteens present on the campus that serve good quality food to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B (Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Amity Law School is one of the best private law schools in West Bengal.

content.Placements: As this is a law course, majority of students here are not first-generation lawyers and often practice with their parents. Amity provides placements in the corporate sector and is very helpful about it. I am not aware of the highest or lowest package offered. Internships are provided by the college, but there are criteria, and not everyone gets them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is on point, and the best that money can buy. Library is huge, and an entire spare building is allotted for it. You will find all the books you can imagine. College also provides an online e-library that gives you a subscription to SCC online and manupatra.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good but academics are not good.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students were placed in our course. Other than this, some students were also recruited for irrelevant jobs. The average package was around 5 LPA. The highest package was about 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Capgemini, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Our college had world class infrastructure. It provided Wi-Fi campus, big classroom, very furnished labs, and library with lots of books. Quality of hostel was also good. Limited sports facility was available. It had basic medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical and Automation Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of campus and academics, good placement for B.Tech.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students got placed with a median salary of Rs 50,000 monthly. The highest package was around 7 LPA last year. The lowest was 4 LPA. Average was around 6 LPA. Volvo, Manhindra & Mahindra, Reliance, and Honda were the top recruiters. 100% of students were offered internships by IT companies like TCS, Wipro, etc. Core companies like Reliance, Mahindra, and Tata. Retail, operations, and QC/QA are the top roles along with some R&D.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, functional labs, spacious classrooms, centralized library, and canteen are available. Other high-quality facilities include hostel, ATM, cafe coffee day, water coolers, elevator, centralized air conditioning, clinic, sports complex including gym and swimming pool, basketball court, cricket pitch, football field, etc.

faqs.answer: A score of at least 50% aggregate is required to study BBA and BCA at Amity University in Kolkata. It is required to score 55% in Class 12 to study BTech. Most postgraduate courses demand students to have graduated with at least 50%. You become eligible to participate after checking the required percentages.
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to Amity University Kolkata?

faqs.answer: Most applicants must fulfill the requirements before they can be admitted to Amity University Kolkata. Getting into some colleges demands either good performance or a passing score on tests like JEE, CAT or CUET. Still, there might be extra admission rules for certain courses. The official admission office is the right place to find out about such alternatives.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity University Kolkata?

paragraphs: Amity University Kolkata admission processstarts with checking academic qualifications and entrance test scores followed by submission of required documents. Students can begin with the registration process followed by selection rounds. Check the step-by-step Amity Kolkata admission process:
Amity University Kolkata Application

Students meet the eligibility requirement can apply online on the official website of the university. Contenders need to pay a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500. Once the payment is done, students can download their forms for future reference.
Selection Rounds
Students selection are done on the basis of national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CUET-UG, CAT, MAT, etc. for specific courses. Admission is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted students have to come for document verification. The seat allotment is done based on the performance of the candidates in the selection rounds. Students need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

courses_data.name: Amity University Kolkata BTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Amity Kolkata offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech in multiple specialisations like Biotechnology, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech admission in Amity University Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 55% aggregate in PCB or PCM are eligible to take admission. In addition, the students with 80% and above aggregate in Class 12 (CBSE/ISC/State-Boards) are exempted from the selection process. Further, depending upon the BTech specialisation, the candidate should have studied particular subjects in class 12, such as Physics, Chemistry, and Maths (PCM) or Biology (PCB). Read more about Amity Kolkata BTech course admissionhere.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Amity University Kolkata BTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria can apply. The eligible students can visit the official website (amity.edu) and submit a duly filled application form online. Candidates can also submit the application form offline. Further, based on performance in JEE Main/Amity JEE followed by group discussion and personal interview, the seat allotments are carried out.

faqs.question: Is Amity University Kolkata good for BTech CSE?

faqs.question: How good is doing an MBA course in Amity University, Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Amity University Kolkata offers a two-year long MBA program. The placements in the MBA programme are impressive with an average placement package of INR 40,000, the highest package offered is INR 60,000, while the lowest is INR 28,000. Prominent organisations that actively recruit from the university include Deloitte, PWC, KPMG, Byju's, ITC, Nestle, Flipkart, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank. Senior analyst and assistant manager are the most common positions offered to the students.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for Amity University Kolkata?
faqs.answer: Amity University, Kolkata bases its admission into its various courses based on merit and nationally accepted entrance exams. The university welcomes candidates to apply for specific courses using national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, CAT, CUET, and others. Each course offered by the university requires a different entrance exam score. Some of the courses like BCA/BCA (Hons), BBA, and BBA LLB (Hons) offer admission based on merit/CUET-UG exam conducted by the NTA along with a minimum score of 50% in Class 12. The university also conducts its entrance exam in addition to a Personal Interview for admissions.

The Amity University Kolkata placements 2023 offered a highest package of INR 32.21 LPA . A few leading global recruiters that took part in the placement include Amazon, TCS, Cognizant, PWC, etc. , at the Amity University Kolkata placement in 2024.

The Amity Centre for Career Development (ACCD) employs experienced and knowledgeable professionals who are experts in different job markets. This team collaborates with the industry partners who provide opportunities such as placement, guest lectures, internships, curriculum contributions, workshops, and industry agreements. Regular counselling is held for students in their pre-final and final years by these teams. Moreover, the team identifies the training requirements of students looking for job placement and the organisation of training in soft skills and aptitude skills.

Amity University Kolkata has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Amity University Kolkata indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
It has been noticed that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Kolkata's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Architecture and Planning' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Amity University Kolkata's rank is #25, the same as last year's rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Professional teachers with good skills.
reviews.review_text: College events like promotions, cultural, and technical fests are conducted twice or thrice a month. A specific set of penalties and punishments is assigned for all the wrong behavior of us. Hostel premises are liberal, but accurate records are maintained. The usage of mobile phones within specified hours is allowed.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Amity University Kolkata is really positive.
reviews.review_text: Campus of the university is not that huge. It has spread over 15 acres of land. There are two academic blocks such as A and E blocks. The campus is located in the outer area of Kolkata. Classrooms are good. The campus is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Campus has a library consists of more than 10,000 books. Different types of labs such as Matlab, seminar halls, etc., are available. There are two canteens present on the campus that serve good quality food to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Amity Law School is one of the best private law schools in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is on point, and the best that money can buy. Library is huge, and an entire spare building is allotted for it. You will find all the books you can imagine. College also provides an online e-library that gives you a subscription to SCC online and manupatra.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good but academics are not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Our college had world class infrastructure. It provided Wi-Fi campus, big classroom, very furnished labs, and library with lots of books. Quality of hostel was also good. Limited sports facility was available. It had basic medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of campus and academics, good placement for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, functional labs, spacious classrooms, centralized library, and canteen are available. Other high-quality facilities include hostel, ATM, cafe coffee day, water coolers, elevator, centralized air conditioning, clinic, sports complex including gym and swimming pool, basketball court, cricket pitch, football field, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great college life, average placement. Enjoyed 2 years of fests - Amity hosts the best in Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is easily accessible throughout the Amity campus. The labs and classrooms are very good, and I can say the library is the best I have seen compared to other colleges. The facilities in our hostel are of high quality. The food in the canteen is much better than that in other college canteens, and the prices are affordable for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: I did a master's from Amity University, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Amity University, Kolkata, has a huge campus and provides a lot of facilities. There are gallery classrooms, AC, Wi-Fi, a library, and labs. In total, there are 3 canteens on campus. There is also an infirmary on the campus with a nurse and a doctor present. Amity has a yearly sports fest called Sangathan.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, and helpful faculties, but needs a bit of transparent placement process.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and college is absolutely amazing. It has top-notch facilities, with good Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, and a huge library with all kinds of books needed for courses. There are three canteens, all serving hygienic and vegetarian food. There are also many shops outside the college that serve non-vegetarian food, which can be brought into the college canteens to sit and eat.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about Amity Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, in fact, one of the best I've seen in Kolkata. Wi-Fi is provided, there are good labs and desktops, and a peaceful library, though it has fewer informative books. Medical facilities include AC rooms. The sports ground is very small, but it is encouraged through several programs such as Sangathan, which is a department-wise sports competition.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were on point in every aspect or department like multiple A/C or Wi-Fi available, all kinds of labs and classrooms high-quality sports equipment, and facilities with skilled coaches. There was a theatre and also a cafeteria. The hostel was the best in the town with ample facilities and luxury. The food in the cafeteria was good and the most important the medical facilities were 24-hour and we got a separate infirmary.

reviews.review_heading: Eventful college life will make you fall in love with the university.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities provided by the university. The lab, Wi-Fi, classroom, library, and canteen are top-anotch. There are 3-4 canteen and all have good food with reasonable price. The library is very well maintained. You have a quiet and personal space for each student.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University is home away from home.
reviews.review_text: There is full Wi-Fi connection on campus. The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. The college is full of greenery. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The whole college is equipped with air-conditioners. The food quality  is good and tasty and they maintain hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Students can join this college without any hesitation.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very well-maintained. The library is very big and peaceful. It has a sports complex and other activities. There is a basketball ground and a badminton court in the college. But we do not have any cricket ground but there we can play football in a small area.

reviews.review_heading: There are really good infrastructure and faculty members in the college.
reviews.review_text: Amity University has a library with comfortable and silent surroundings. This university has 5 blocks. The examination block is separate from other blocks and 4 blocks are for classes for different courses. The university has a sports complex with different games.

college_info.college_name: Amity University Kolkata Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The institute offers BCA and BCA + MCA, but the tuition fees for both courses are different. The total tuition fees for the BCA course are INR 3.63 Lacs and INR 8 Lacs for BCA + MCA.

The minimum eligibility criteria involve a minimum 50% aggregate in Class 12 for admission to the BCA course. However, for admission to the BCA course, priority will be given to the student who has appeared in any one of the entrance exams that is accepted by the institute.
The institute accepts 2 entrance exams for admission to the BCA course:
Students can visit the institute's official website for more details.
The total cost of pursuing a BA degree at Amity University Kolkata in 2025 is estimated between INR 5.65 Lacs - INR 12.32 Lakh. This includes:

Amity University Kolkata will offer a variety of courses in 2024 at varied tuition costs. The cost of tuition for an MBA or PGDM programme is INR 8 lakh. For students looking to pursue engineering and technology can enrol in the B.E./B.Tech programs, which have fees ranging from INR 4.3 lakh to INR 8.9 lakh. Furthermore, Amity University Kolkata offers a B.Sc. programme that ranges in tuition from INR 2.1 lakh to INR 3.9 lakh, making it an attractive option for individuals with a scientific bent. The university's dedication to providing high-quality instruction in a range of subject areas is reflected in its diverse fee structure.

The application fee for various UG and PG courses offered at Amity University Kolkata is INR 1,100. The application fee is payable online via a debit/ credit card or net banking. Only after the submission of the fee, an application is successfully submitted. Candidates must also keep the fee submission receipt copy.

reviews_list.review_title: A short glimpse of GMC Firozabad .

review_content.Placements: It is an medical college providing internship to almost 100 percent of students in allied hospital ie. District hospital. In internship, average student get around 12 k - 18k for a month. Intern will be posted in each department for around 1- 1.5 months i.e. rotatory internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are seperate lecture theatre for each batch for theory classes. Proper building is there, a well maintained academic block with each department having sufficient facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. Seperate hostels for boys and girls with attached mess. Sports facility also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.

review_content.Placements: Internships for 2019 batch are provided in 2024 which will be the first batch of our college for NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic block and the library are well-equipped and has well-established infrastructure. Library has air-conditioners. Canteen and cafeteria facilities are not available but separate girls' and boys' messes are provided with scheduled weekly menu charts. Sports are played by students.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable and qualified. They organise various seminars every year, project chartworks, group discussions, and educational skits performed by students which are given marks in the internal assessments. Semester exams are little difficult compared to professional exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good, the faculty is helpful, and all library facilities are okay.

review_content.Placements: As we are in MBBS, there is nothing to say about the placements. We are a batch of about 100 students, and we are the second batch from our college. Our college can't tell about the final year results. According to the present results, we are hoping for a good result in the future with a good amount of PG selection.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college campus is okay. The college campus is outside the city, so the area around it is not well developed. Library facilities are also not bad. Sports facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. Mess food is as in other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The dream of becoming a doctor fulfilled.

content.Placements: This is a new college. None of the batches have completed their internships yet, so let's see what the upcoming ratio of selected students in NEET PG will be in the upcoming years. Batch 2019 will be the first batch to give the NEET PG score.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good; as it is a new college, everything in the college is new: furniture, equipment, labs. It's a Wi-Fi campus, even in the hostel Wi-Fi is installed. There is a canteen, and a mess is also available. There are good facilities for sports, and a library is there too.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average but a worthy medical college.

We celebrate some events, like the college festival, Dandiya nights and some religious events. Classrooms are well ventilated and sufficient.

description: Government Medical College Firozabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College Firozabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26148 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College Firozabad MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26148 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17273 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College Firozabad accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College Firozabad NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 68800. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College Firozabad MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Pathology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 68800.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College Firozabad cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 17842 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 20020 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

reviews.review_text: The campus is amazing. The library has all the famous and useful books for MBBS. We have limited space for outdoor and indoor games and other activities. We celebrate some events, like the college festival, Dandiya nights and some religious events. Classrooms are well ventilated and sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: A short glimpse of GMC Firozabad .
reviews.review_text: There are seperate lecture theatre for each batch for theory classes. Proper building is there, a well maintained academic block with each department having sufficient facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. Seperate hostels for boys and girls with attached mess. Sports facility also present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Academic block and the library are well-equipped and has well-established infrastructure. Library has air-conditioners. Canteen and cafeteria facilities are not available but separate girls' and boys' messes are provided with scheduled weekly menu charts. Sports are played by students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, the faculty is helpful, and all library facilities are okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college campus is okay. The college campus is outside the city, so the area around it is not well developed. Library facilities are also not bad. Sports facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. Mess food is as in other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college and had a good experience, not dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Academic block has an excellent infrastructure with teachers from some of the best institutions like AIIMS Delhi. The hostels are our pride as they are very good, neat and clean. Good quality mess food is also available. Our hostel rooms and library has Wi-Fi for every one.

reviews.review_heading: Review of this college for the new batches joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite not so good. It lacks in some sports facilities. Rest the facilities provided by all the departments in the college are good. Labs are well maintained. A library is also provided by the college for self study.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college and hostels are good. Free Wi-Fi services are available in both the hostel and the college. The campus remains clean. There are very good practical laboratories with equipment, which is necessary for developing skills and knowledge. The food quality is also satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Firozabad is best among all newly opened medical colleges in UP.
reviews.review_text: The college campus has well managed library but it has no Wi-Fi connection. The labs are well maintained and lecture theater are also good. Hostels are separate for boys and girls and have all basic needs like proper water along with lift and Wi-Fi. Mess are also their in each hostel but the quality of food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good medical institute with experienced faculty members, good labs, library and hostel.
reviews.review_text: This college is a newly established medical college so the infrastructure is not so good, because infrastructure needs a lot of time to become better. Wi-Fi facility is provided in hostel and academic block. Laboratories, library, classroom are fully air-conditioned and well-developed. Canteen service does not provide yet. For sports, a stadium is attached to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the hostel is average, and it provides basic facilities. But it could have been better. There is no ground for us to play and if it rains then we have nothing to do. There is no proper cutting of grass. Initially, there was a contract with a stadium but now the college does not pay for it.

reviews.review_heading: Autonomous state medical college Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in the college is excellent as it is new opened medical college, college campus has well-equipped labs, lecture theatres and proper air conditioned library. Boys and girls hostel are seperate with attached mess, hostel rooms are two seater. Hostel and campus has lift also.

reviews.review_heading: It is an autonomous state medical college and hospital in Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Labs of all departments are well-maintained and equipped with good ventilation and an environment to practice and learn. The campus is not Wi-Fi oriented. Lecture theatres are good and enough for 100 students and also air-conditioned. There is an air-conditioned and large library which can accommodate more than 200 students. The timing of issuing books is fixed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: It is a new campus and was started in 2019 only. The buildings are new and advanced. Highly furnished lecture theatres are available with digital advancement. The library is good, and the labs are developed for all research purposes. The hostel mess provides good and hygienic food at a reasonable rate. All medical facilities are provided free of cost to all students.

reviews.review_heading: It has great infrastructure and worthy experience of medical student life with working out tips.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. The central library is very big and great. Free Wi-Fi is available across the campus and hostel. Labs are equipped with all the required facilities, and classrooms are spacious with seats arranged in the form of stairs with air-conditioning. Mess is attached to the hostel and has great food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of students who opt for BDS, and it has a high income rate. Internship is compulsory for this course; every dental college, including mine, has an internship program available, and almost all students enter for internship in the same college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite ordinary but efficient enough to do daily work. A lot of dental chairs don't work efficiently, but some of them do, and the hostels are fine according to the feels. Water coolers are available, and only vegetarian food is available in the mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an affordable college.

review_content.Placements: Our college is for dentistry, so our college doesn't provide placements for our course. Other college doesn't provide any such placements in this course. BDS tutors are appointed in some colleges. Our college provides around 1-2 jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good enough for the number of patients. The hostel is average. The food served in the mess is average. LT is good and equipped with an air-conditioner. All labs are available in average conditions. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good qualifications and experience in budget-friendly dental college.

content.Placements: BDS and MS both courses are introduced here. It is a 4-year course and 1 year of internship can provide you with completion same as MS in every department 2 years and internships are provided after completion of degree. Approximately, in BDS 8 LPA package is offered. In MS depending upon the department approximately 15 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi service is provided in the hostel, but in college this facility is provided nicely. Classrooms and department conditions are good. Every day from time to time workers are present for the cleaning of every department. Water coolers are there in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: General Overview of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.

content.Placements: Intake: 100 students. 0 packages offered. Internship: 100%. BDS and MS courses are offered here. The duration of the course is 5 years for BDS, and the duration of the MS degree is 3 years in total. You can apply for both clinical and non-clinical job sectors upon completing the course or degree.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities: Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, library, separate departments for every subject. Quality of food in the hostel: 3/10. The rest of the factors depend upon the mentality of the professors and the behavior pattern of the students in terms of teaching and understanding.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college and value for money.

content.Placements: There are a lot of students who opt for BDS, and it has a high income rate. Internship is compulsory for this course; every dental college, including mine, has an internship program available, and almost all students enter for internship in the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite ordinary but efficient enough to do daily work. A lot of dental chairs don't work efficiently, but some of them do, and the hostels are fine according to the feels. Water coolers are available, and only vegetarian food is available in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable college.

content.Placements: Our college is for dentistry, so our college doesn't provide placements for our course. Other college doesn't provide any such placements in this course. BDS tutors are appointed in some colleges. Our college provides around 1-2 jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good enough for the number of patients. The hostel is average. The food served in the mess is average. LT is good and equipped with an air-conditioner. All labs are available in average conditions. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best dental college in Sriganganagar with affordable fees.

content.Placements: The salary package depends on your clinical experience and practice. We have to get a master's degree. It was a medical course. We can work in hospitals and open our own clinics. Roles offered were periodontists, orthodontists, pedodontists, prosthodontists, endodontists, and oral surgeons.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was huge, with different departments. It had classrooms and a huge library. We got good food and good rooms in the hostel, along with every facility. There was a huge ground in front of the college with courts to play basketball, football, volleyball, and badminton.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centreadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET MDS, and Rajasthan NEET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 5,20,000 - 19,50,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 5 years.

cut_off.college_name: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1190948 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre BDS cutoff 2025 was 1190948 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1092231 for admission to the BDS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The institute accepts admission to BDS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
In Round 1 the BDS Cutoff 2025 was, 1044834, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 1190948 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

There was a huge ground in front of the college with courts to play basketball, football, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs and classrooms are well-furnished. Our college has a library. The hostel is not much good. The food served in the mess is good. It provides vegetarian food items.

reviews.review_heading: College is worth it according to fees.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome until you can't compare this college to other dental or medical colleges. Classes are good not AC is there but mostly theory is off. The library is here. Hostel infrastructure and hostel food are average and hostel management is below average.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good, but there are no extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The library is air-conditioned. The classrooms are available. It has a ground for some sports like volleyball, football, badminton court, basketball etc. Every sports club is present, and the facilities of indoor games like chess, carrom, etc., are available. The college has well-equipped labs, and the labs of almost all subjects are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but the faculty members are good. Classrooms or lecture halls are well lit and air-conditioned. The library is also good and is up to date. Hostel facilities are also average for UG residents and good for PG residents.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The hostel facility is also average. I think there is no need to expect that much from a hostel and it is average to live i.e. the there is no bad, and the environment is friendly. Students can stay there.

reviews.review_heading: The overall college is good, and results are best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, with a library that had all labs and practice rooms for each department. The mess food was average, but there was complete safety in the hostel. The cleaning in the hostel and rooms was maintained well. There were 5 water coolers.

reviews.review_heading: Could be a good option for those who scores below cut off in neet.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average as well as the hostel. Everything related to course is available with mediocre condition. There are well maintained laboratories and classroom is also very interactive. Hostel is average. Food is we can say below average. Medical facilities are upto the mark.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, but the infrastructure is average and there are no extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi connection on campus. There are good facilities, but the hostel and mess are average, and the overall infrastructure is average because the college campus is not so large and there is a small canteen available.
